item.title: Custom Boring Bar for Hard‑to‑Reach Gear Face
item.description: A shop‑made boring bar tackles a gear face that’s nearly impossible to reach with standard tooling. What clever machining design makes this precision repair possible?

media:content.media:title: Custom Boring Bar for Hard‑to‑Reach Gear Face
media:content.media:description: A shop‑made boring bar tackles a gear face that’s nearly impossible to reach with standard tooling. What clever machining design makes this precision repair possible?

item.title: Oversized Bushings: Line Boring & Bore Welding
item.description: Oversized bushings call for line boring and bore welding. How does this process ensure a perfect fit?

media:content.media:description: Oversized bushings call for line boring and bore welding. How does this process ensure a perfect fit?

item.title: Sunnen HTA‑4100 Honing: Cross Hatch Finish
item.description: Using the Sunnen HTA‑4100 honing machine to rough and finish with cross hatching. How does this process restore inner surfaces?

item.description: Quartz proves too much for a ripper shank in this workshop test. What machining solution will overcome the challenge?

item.title: Cylinder Repair: Removing a Broomstick Obstruction
item.description: See the unusual task of removing a broomstick jammed inside a double‑acting cylinder. What’s the best way to clear such a blockage?

item.title: Tiny End Mill, Big Keyway
item.description: A small end mill cuts a full‑length 5mm keyway with precision. How can such a tiny tool deliver such a big result?

item.title: Extractor Test: Acetylene Smoke vs. Metal Arc Spray
item.description: Testing a shop‑made extractor with acetylene smoke before putting it against the metal arc spray machine. Will it withstand the ultimate challenge?

item.title: Precision Milling on a Vintage Sip Jig Borer
item.description: Experience precision milling using a vintage Sip jig borer, blending old craftsmanship with modern needs. How does this machine hold up against today’s standards?

item.title: Vintage Slotting Attachment Rebuild
item.description: See the rebuild of a vintage slotting attachment brought back to life with precision machining. How does this classic tool still prove its worth today?
